_comment: Shared RBAC catalogue (HomeOps plan §4.2/B2). Single source of truth for the role→permission map. The backend pins app.domain.enums.ROLE_PERMISSIONS to this (test_rbac.py) and the @homeops/core PERMISSIONS const is pinned to this permission universe (permissions.test.ts). A change here must pass on both sides — keeps web/mobile UI gating and the backend gate in lockstep.
